evaluators.name: Review Output Quality
evaluators.focus: Quality, trustworthiness, and persona-grounding of the structured UX review the pipeline produces — evidence-grounded reasoning, journey-stage attribution, business-goal anchoring, strict competitor-name rule compliance, 8-dimension scoring discipline, Blocker/High/Medium/Nit severity defensibility, and persona voice alignment.

evaluators.name: Prompt & LLM Pipeline Engineering
evaluators.focus: Prompt templates, LLM configuration, retry reliability, pipeline structure, and token efficiency of the two-stage Gemini pipeline (enrich_persona + run_review).

evaluators.name: Web UX & Frontend Quality
evaluators.focus: Quality of the server-rendered web form + result view (webapp.py): form flow, skeleton loading, accessibility (WCAG 2.2 AA), visual language, responsive breakpoints, bilingual EN/KO, and inline frontend code quality.
